name: InfoAge Computer Museum Docent Resources
description: Source materials and drafts for the InfoAge Computer Museum docent manual. Mirrors the 'Docent Shared Resources' Drive folder shared by Jeff Brace, plus original drafts authored by Nick.

sources.description: Mirror of the Google Drive 'Docent Shared Resources' folder (1UeWnuDr5Iocb8RKokfobnmPjBu8k01Tr) — extracted from 4-part zip on 2026-04-24. Read-only source material.
Original drafts of the docent manual authored by Nick. Editable. Subfolders: artifacts/, operational/, general/.
Authoritative remote folder. Re-sync via Drive MCP or zip download when the local mirror gets stale.

structural_template.title: Radio Technology Museum Docent Handbook v4.0 (Spring 2018, partial)
structural_template.note: Closest existing example of a docent handbook at InfoAge. Not for the computer museum but its 6-section structure (general / open-close / map / history / area summaries / per-area deep dives) transfers directly.

jeff_brace.role: VCF National Board VP, VCF East showrunner, volunteer coordinator
jeff_brace.source: Docent FAQ.docx — 'DOCENT MANUAL — This is a work in progress. As I have more time, I will start to make this into a real document instead of assorted pages and information. Anyone willing to help me on this, please let me know.'
